svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.5.2 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.6.1 Safari/537.36" version="29.5.2" scale="1" border="10"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="Ba6dILi04iNG3jEx5-Oo"> <mxGraphModel dx="1722" dy="1001" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-8" edge="1" parent="1" source="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-2" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;gradientColor=none;" value="Platform Side (Self-host)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="270" width="520" x="80" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-4" parent="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-2" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;align=left;" value="<p dir="auto" style="white-space-collapse: preserve;"><strong><font style="font-size: 10px;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>A. Signaling Control Layer (GB/T 28181 Platform Functions)</font></strong></p><ul dir="auto"><li><font style="font-size: 10px;">SIP Client: REGISTER / INVITE / ACK / BYE / MESSAGE / ...</font></li><li><font style="font-size: 10px;">SDP encoding/decoding and media negotiation (specify media server IP/Port)</font></li><li><font style="font-size: 10px;">XML encoding/decoding: Catalog, DeviceControl, Alarm, RecordInfo, etc.</font></li><li style=""><font style="font-size: 10px;">Digest authentication calculation, keep-alive and reconnection mechanism</font></li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="500" x="10" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-5" parent="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-2" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;align=left;" value="<p dir="auto" style="white-space-collapse: preserve;"><strong><font style="font-size: 10px;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>B. Media Server Layer (Your implementation / integration)</font></strong></p><ul dir="auto"><li><font style="font-size: 10px;">RTP/RTCP stream reception (receive audio/video streams from the device)</font></li><li><font style="font-size: 10px;">Stream processing: decoding (H.264/H.265, G.711/AAC), transcoding, storage, forwardin</font></li><li><font style="font-size: 10px;">Stream distribution: provide playback/download interfaces to web clients, NVR, and 3rd-party platforms</font></li><li><font style="font-size: 10px;">Supported protocols: RTP/UDP, RTP/TCP, RTSP (optional)</font></li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="500" x="10" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-12" edge="1" parent="1" source="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-9"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;" value="<p dir="auto" style="white-space-collapse: preserve;"><strong><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>Network Transport Layer</strong></p><ul dir="auto"><li>Can cross public/private networks, NAT/firewalls</li><li>Ports to open: SIP signaling port (e.g. 5060), RTP stream port range (e.g. 10000–20000)</li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="520" x="80" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-9" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;gradientColor=none;" value="Device Side (Already&nbsp;<span style="white-space-collapse: preserve; background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Implemented</span><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">)</span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="270" width="520" x="80" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-10" parent="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-9" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;align=left;" value="<p dir="auto" style="white-space-collapse: preserve;"><strong><font style="font-size: 10px;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>A. Signaling Layer (GB/T 28181 Device Functions)</font></strong></p><ul dir="auto"><li><font style="font-size: 10px;">SIP Server/Client: handles registration, calls, control, notifications, etc</font></li><li><font style="font-size: 10px;">SDP encoding/decoding and media negotiation (device sends IP/Port/Codec)</font></li><li><font style="font-size: 10px;">XML encoding/decoding: responses for Catalog, DeviceControl, Alarm, etc.</font></li><li><font style="font-size: 10px;">Digest authentication calculation, keep-alive and reconnection mechanism</font></li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="500" x="10" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-11" parent="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-9" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;align=left;" value="<p dir="auto" style="white-space-collapse: preserve;"><strong><font style="font-size: 10px;"><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>B. Media Sending Layer (</font></strong><strong><font style="font-size: 10px;">GB/T 28181 Device Functions</font></strong><strong><font style="font-size: 10px;">)</font></strong></p><ul dir="auto"><li><font style="font-size: 10px;">Audio/video encoding: H.264/H.265 video, G.711/AAC audio</font></li><li><font style="font-size: 10px;">RTP/RTCP stream sending: sends streams according to the IP/Port/Codec negotiated in SDP</font></li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="500" x="10" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-13" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" value="<font style="font-size: 8px;"><i>SIP signaling (UDP/TCP/TLS)</i></font><div><font style="font-size: 8px;"><i>SDP Media Negotiation (Specify Media Server IP/Port)</i></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 8px;"><i>RTP/RTCP streams (UDP/TCP)</i></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="360" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vONJt0kx5l2RRCloSJyn-14" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" value="<font style="font-size: 8px;"><i>SIP signaling (UDP/TCP/TLS)</i></font><div><font style="font-size: 8px;"><i>SDP Media Negotiation (Device Sends IP/Port)</i></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 8px;"><i>RTP/RTCP streams (UDP/TCP)</i></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44.5" width="240" x="360" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 22px; margin-left: 11px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 90px; margin-left: 22px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

strong.font: A. Signaling Control Layer (GB/T 28181 Platform Functions)

li.font: SIP Client: REGISTER / INVITE / ACK / BYE / MESSAGE / ...
SDP encoding/decoding and media negotiation (specify media server IP/Port)
XML encoding/decoding: Catalog, DeviceControl, Alarm, RecordInfo, etc.
Digest authentication calculation, keep-alive and reconnection mechanism

switch.text: A. Signaling Control Layer (GB/T 28181 Platform Functions)...

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 220px; margin-left: 22px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

strong.font: B. Media Server Layer (Your implementation / integration)

li.font: RTP/RTCP stream reception (receive audio/video streams from the device)
Stream processing: decoding (H.264/H.265, G.711/AAC), transcoding, storage, forwardin
Stream distribution: provide playback/download interfaces to web clients, NVR, and 3rd-party platforms

switch.text: B. Media Server Layer (Your implementation / integration)...

ul.li: Ports to open: SIP signaling port (e.g. 5060), RTP stream port range (e.g. 10000–20000)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 611px; margin-left: 11px;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 680px; margin-left: 22px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

li.font: SIP Server/Client: handles registration, calls, control, notifications, etc
SDP encoding/decoding and media negotiation (device sends IP/Port/Codec)
XML encoding/decoding: responses for Catalog, DeviceControl, Alarm, etc.
Digest authentication calculation, keep-alive and reconnection mechanism

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 810px; margin-left: 22px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

li.font: Audio/video encoding: H.264/H.265 video, G.711/AAC audio
RTP/RTCP stream sending: sends streams according to the IP/Port/Codec negotiated in SDP

switch.text: B. Media Sending Layer (GB/T 28181 Device Functions)...
